name: Additive mania or behavioral activation risk
actions: Use caution when combining agents that can contribute to mania or behavioral activation in susceptible patients.
Monitor for decreased need for sleep, increased goal-directed activity, impulsivity, irritability, or unusually elevated mood, especially after initiation or dose escalation (educational).
Reassess promptly if clinically significant activation emerges (educational).

rationale: Both drugs can contribute to behavioral activation or mania risk in susceptible patients.
Combined use may increase the likelihood of clinically significant activation.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} can both contribute to activation or mania risk in susceptible patients, so closer monitoring may be appropriate when they are combined.
